inputs.label: Current Fuel Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Average fuel consumption per 100 km under typical load conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average fuel consumption per 100 km under typical load conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tipik yük koşullarında 100 km başına ortalama yakıt tüketimi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittlicher Kraftstoffverbrauch pro 100 km unter typischen Lastbedingungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation moyenne de carburant aux 100 km dans des conditions de charge typiques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Consumo promedio de combustible por cada 100 km en condiciones de carga típicas.

inputs.label: Annual Distance Traveled
inputs.businessContext: Total kilometers traveled by the vehicle per year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total kilometers traveled by the vehicle per year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Aracın yılda kat ettiği toplam kilometre.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total de kilomètres parcourus par le véhicule par an.
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de kilómetros recorridos por el vehículo por año.

inputs.label: Fuel Price
inputs.businessContext: Unit price of fuel (e.g., diesel, gasoline).

businessContext_i18n.en: Unit price of fuel (e.g., diesel, gasoline).
businessContext_i18n.de: Stückpreis des Kraftstoffs (z. B. Diesel, Benzin).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Prix unitaire du carburant (ex. diesel, essence).
businessContext_i18n.es: Precio unitario del combustible (p. ej., diésel, gasolina).

inputs.label: Efficiency Improvement
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage reduction in fuel consumption due to improvements.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage reduction in fuel consumption due to improvements.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İyileştirmeler nedeniyle beklenen yakıt tüketimi yüzde azalması.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete prozentuale Reduzierung des Kraftstoffverbrauchs durch Verbesserungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage attendu de réduction de la consommation de carburant grâce aux améliorations.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje esperado de reducción en el consumo de combustible debido a mejoras.

inputs.label: Engine Load Factor
inputs.businessContext: Average engine load as a percentage, adjusting real-world consumption.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average engine load as a percentage, adjusting real-world consumption.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gerçek dünya tüketimini ayarlayan ortalama motor yükü yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Motorlast in Prozent, die den realen Verbrauch anpasst.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Charge moyenne du moteur en pourcentage, ajustant la consommation réelle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Carga promedio del motor como porcentaje, ajustando el consumo real.

inputs.label: Operating Years
inputs.businessContext: Number of years over which savings accumulate.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of years over which savings accumulate.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Jahre, über die sich Einsparungen ansammeln.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'années sur lesquelles les économies s'accumulent.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de años durante los cuales se acumulan los ahorros.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
